mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article_reviews (user_id, article_id, title, content, helpful_count, not_helpful_count, reply_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{articleId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{helpfulCount}, #{notHelpfulCount}, #{replyCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM article_reviews WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT * FROM article_reviews WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
ORDER BY created_at DESC
ORDER BY created_at ASC
ORDER BY helpful_count DESC, created_at DESC
ORDER BY helpful_count DESC, created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_reviews WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
